key_insight: Open-source template matching can accurately map crystal orientations from AC-STEM Kikuchi patterns, enabling high-resolution orientation analysis in nanoscale polycrystals.
engineering_relevance: This provides a practical, open-source route for orientation mapping of battery and fuel-cell materials where grain orientation strongly affects performance.
method: Generate a master pattern using dynamical Kikuchi-band simulation on the unit sphere.
Import the master pattern into geometric simulation/indexing software for template matching.
Index AC-STEM TKD patterns to recover grain orientations with high spatial resolution.
evidence_signal: The approach was validated on BZCYYb4411 and LiNiO2, where the best-matched simulated patterns showed strong agreement with experimental data even with limited diffraction space.
watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality of the simulated master pattern and the restricted diffraction geometry available in AC-STEM TKD.
paper_title: Orientation Mapping via Dictionary Indexing of AC-STEM Kikuchi patterns using Open-source Software
